action.reasoning: Observation: Best test bacc=0.6448 (img_size=252, 7ep). The checkpoint doesn't have img_size saved, predict.py defaults to 252 which matches training. Squirrel/bird classes weak. Val 0.842 vs test 0.645 = domain gap. Have 2.69h, 21 iters. Analysis: To push further, try: (a) ensemble of two backbones (DINOv2 + CLIP), (b) train on train+val combined for more data and diversity. (c) larger image size 308 (multiple of 14, 22 patches). Risk of overfitting source domains is real. Let me try training with USE_VAL=1 (more data) at img_size=252, 8 epochs, save the final checkpoint (since no real val to track when using all data, save last). Decision: Train with USE_VAL=1, save last epoch checkpoint, then submit.
action.command: USE_VAL=1 IMG_SIZE=252 EPOCHS=8 BATCH=48 SAVE_LAST=1 SAVE_PATH=checkpoints/uv.pt python train.py
